localMetadata.notes: Labels are not PIT, adjusted OHLC, or institutional readiness evidence.

posture.summary: Diagnostic projection only; no PIT universe, survivorship-bias-safe universe, adjusted OHLC lineage, snapshot reproducibility, or decision-grade institutional readiness evidence is available.

pointInTimeUniverseMembership.evidenceRequired: Versioned point-in-time universe membership with effective dates.
pointInTimeUniverseMembership.summary: No point-in-time universe membership contract is present.

survivorshipBiasSafeUniverseEvidence.evidenceRequired: Survivorship-bias-safe universe evidence covering inactive and delisted symbols.
survivorshipBiasSafeUniverseEvidence.summary: No survivorship-bias-safe universe evidence is present.

delistingInactiveSymbolHandling.evidenceRequired: Explicit delisting and inactive-symbol handling policy.
delistingInactiveSymbolHandling.summary: No delisting or inactive-symbol handling contract is present.

splitDividendCorporateActionAdjustedOhlc.evidenceRequired: Split, dividend, and corporate-action adjusted OHLC lineage.
splitDividendCorporateActionAdjustedOhlc.summary: No adjusted OHLC lineage for splits, dividends, or corporate actions is present.

adjustmentMethodologyVersion.summary: No adjustment methodology or version is present.

exchangeCalendarSessionAlignment.evidenceRequired: Exchange calendar and session alignment contract.
exchangeCalendarSessionAlignment.summary: No exchange calendar or session alignment contract is present.

symbolIdentifierLineage.summary: No symbol or identifier lineage contract is present.

vendorSourceProvenance.evidenceRequired: Vendor/source provenance for historical bars and universe membership.
vendorSourceProvenance.summary: No vendor or source provenance contract is present.

asOfTimestampPolicy.evidenceRequired: As-of timestamp policy for historical data and metadata.
asOfTimestampPolicy.summary: No as-of timestamp policy is present.

missingStaleBarPolicy.summary: No missing-bar or stale-bar policy is present.

historicalSnapshotReproducibility.summary: No historical snapshot reproducibility proof is present.

decisionGradeInstitutionalReadiness.evidenceRequired: Approved PIT, adjusted data, provenance, reproducibility, and institutional readiness contract.
decisionGradeInstitutionalReadiness.summary: Decision-grade institutional readiness is not approved.
